 		${PEARDIR}/.channels/pear.phpunit.de.reg:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear-channel-phpunit

 		pear-TheSeer_fDOMDocument>=1.3.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear-TheSeer_fDOMDocument \

 		${PEARDIR}/.channels/pear.phpunit.de.reg:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear-channel-phpunit
